name: ADN Bridge
description: Bind Telegram topics to coding repos. /bridge bind <repo> auto-clones and starts an ACP session.

reposDir.description: Root directory for cloned repos. Defaults to ~/repos.

defaultRuntime.description: Default coding runtime. Defaults to claude.

reposDir.label: Repos Directory
reposDir.help: Where to clone repos. Defaults to ~/repos.
